Home.title: Give your <highlight>memories</highlight> a voice
Home.subtitle: Every photo hides a story waiting to be told. Let our AI breathe life into your images and describe the magic captured within them.

Features.instantInferenceTitle: Magic in the blink of an eye
Features.instantInferenceDesc: Watch in awe as our advanced servers understand your photos instantly, bringing your visual stories to life before you even blink.
Features.stateOfArtDesc: Powered by a brilliant AI brain, it doesn't just see objects — it feels the atmosphere, the context, and the emotion of your moments.
Features.secureStorageDesc: Your cherished moments are yours alone. We wrap every photo in ultimate security, ensuring your personal magic stays private.
